Nguyen Thu Trang

UnderGraduate Student

Business

About Me

Thu Trang Nguyen was born in Hanoi, Vietnam, in 2004. She is currently pursuing a dual Bachelor’s degree in Marketing at the International School, Vietnam National University, Hanoi, Vietnam and Bachelor of Business (Marketing) from HELP University, Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia. Her research activities include Brand Equity, Consumer Behavior, Brand Management, the impact of Artificial Intelligence (AI) on business enterprises, Social Sciences, ESG and Large language model (LLM).

Education

  • BA in Marketing
    Vietnam National University - International School, Vietnam, 2022
  • BA in Business (Marketing)
    HELP University, Malaysia, 2022

Work Experience

  • Social Marketing - iFact Media
    Content Ecosystem has over 1B views monthly and a Fanpage reach 2.3M followers.
  • Content Marketing - SAPP Academy
    A premier educational partner holding ACCA Platinum, IMA Gold, and CFA Institute Prep Provider statuses.
  • Content Marketing - ICDL Vietnam
    An accredited member of the global governing body for the International Certification of Digital Literacy (ICDL).
  • Marketing Coordinator - Student Affairs Department, International School - VNU
    Writing promotional articles, creating content to promote admission and organizing collaborative events.
  • Digital Marketing - TK Venture
    A leading Web3 media publisher in Southeast Asia.

Publications

  • Thu-Trang, N. & Anh, N. N. Don’t Stop Believin’: How Hotel Response Strategies Mitigate The Impact Of Negative Review Valence On Online Booking Intentions. In 2025 International Conference on Sustainable Innovation in Business and Economics.

Awards & Honors

  • Certificate of Merit for outstanding achievements in organizing and executing the Parade commemorating the 80th Anniversary of the August Revolution.
  • Overseas Education and Learning Programme 2025 collaboration with Nanyang Polytechnics, Singapore.
  • Student Exchange Program 2024 with the Ehrenberg-Bass Institute for Marketing Science, UniSA, Australia.
  • Global Engagement & Enriching Student Experience Programme 2025, Malaysia.
  • Academic Merit Scholarship 2022 - 2023, 2023 - 2024, 2024 - 2025.
  • BONDBUDDIES Project Stage Presentation - Top 6 Northern Region of the "New Generation Students" Contest.
